mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_emp( dept_id, emp_no, emp_name, phone, job_title, entry_date, emp_status, position_id, email, gender, birth_date, id_card, address, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, entry_status, leave_date, leave_reason, create_time ) VALUES ( #{deptId}, #{empNo}, #{empName}, #{phone}, #{jobTitle}, #{entryDate}, #{empStatus}, #{positionId}, #{email}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{idCard}, #{address}, #{emergencyContact}, #{emergencyPhone}, #{entryStatus}, #{leaveDate}, #{leaveReason}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_emp WHERE emp_status = #{status}
